hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "(merge|push).*(main)"; then echo "MANDATORY: Per CLAUDE.md Section 5, run the merge-to-main CLAUDE.md update checklist now (sections 10, 11, 12, 7 — then show diff to user)."; fi'
